titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Ziyad Ibn Marwan Al-Qandi
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Ziyad Ibn Marwan Al-Qandi

segments: ه عن زياد بن مروان القنديّ فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن، محمّد بن عيسى بن عبيد؛ و يعقوب بن يزيد، عن زياد بن مروان القنديّ‌.
arabic.text: ه عن زياد بن مروان القنديّ فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن، محمّد بن عيسى بن عبيد؛ و يعقوب بن يزيد، عن زياد بن مروان القنديّ‌.

segments: Everything in this book that is narrated from Ziyad ibn Marwan Al-Qandi has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sa'd ibn Abdullah, from Muhammad ibn 'Isa ibn 'Ubayd and Ya'qub ibn Yazid, from Ziyad ibn Marwan Al-Qandi.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Everything in this book that is narrated from Ziyad ibn Marwan Al-Qandi has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sa'd ibn Abdullah, from Muhammad ibn 'Isa ibn 'Ubayd and Ya'qub ibn Yazid, from Ziyad ibn Marwan Al-Qandi.
